title: control-plane-iac deployment template
description: Renders a Flux GitRepository + tofu-controller Terraform CR (both in flux-system). GUI schema for the Devtron deployment template.

name.title: Block Name
name.description: Unique per environment. Names the Terraform CR and (with -source) the GitRepository. dev and prod MUST differ — both land in flux-system.

targetNamespace.title: Target Namespace
targetNamespace.description: Namespace for BOTH CRs. Pinned to flux-system (where tofu-controller + tf-runner live). Do not change per environment.

source.title: Git Source
source.description: The IaC repo tofu-controller reads. Shared across blocks (same repo); only the path differs.

url.title: Repo URL
url.description: HTTPS (public) or ssh:// (private, needs secretRef) URL of the IaC repo.

path.title: Path
path.description: Single shared root the CR runs tofu in. Same for every block (./).

interval.title: Sync Interval
interval.description: How often Flux re-checks the repo, e.g. 1m.

secretRef.title: Auth Secret
secretRef.description: Secret in flux-system with git creds. Only for private repos.

interval.title: Reconcile Interval
interval.description: How often the controller re-reconciles, e.g. 5m.

approvePlan.title: Approve Plan
approvePlan.description: auto = plan+apply each interval; plan-<branch>-<sha> = manual gate.

destroyResourcesOnDeletion.title: Destroy On Deletion
destroyResourcesOnDeletion.description: tofu destroy when the CR is deleted. Keep false unless offboarding.

serviceAccountName.title: Runner ServiceAccount
serviceAccountName.description: KSA the runner pod uses (WIF-bound). tf-runner in flux-system.

tfVarsFiles.title: Var Files
tfVarsFiles.description: PER-ENV: .tfvars files to load (-var-file), relative to path. dev block => [dev.tfvars]; prod block => [prod.tfvars].

backend.title: State Backend (GCS)
backend.description: Remote tfstate. Prefix differs per block so dev/prod never collide.

bucket.title: State Bucket
bucket.description: GCS bucket holding tfstate. Must be writable by the runner GSA.

outputs.title: Outputs
outputs.description: tofu outputs written to the Secret <name>-outputs in flux-system.

autoscaling.title: Autoscaling (Devtron validator stub)
autoscaling.description: Unused by this chart. Present because Devtron's deployment-template validation requires capitalized MinReplicas/MaxReplicas.

image.title: Image (Devtron stub)
image.description: Injected by Devtron; unused by this chart.
